name: 考研英语精选 100
description: 首批 100 张考研增强学习卡，重点覆盖熟词僻义、学术论证、逻辑关系、因果表达与阅读方法。

cards.sentenceEn: The reform must address the unequal access to educational resources.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项改革必须解决教育资源获取不平等的问题。
cards.clozeSuffix: the unequal access to educational resources.
cards.usageNotes: 考研阅读中常见 address a problem/issue/need，表示“着手处理”，而不是“地址”。

relatedExpressions.note: 最普通的“处理”，语体较中性
强调积极处理棘手问题

extraExamples.en: The report addresses several weaknesses in the current system.
extraExamples.zh: 该报告处理了现行制度中的几个薄弱环节。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 方法；处理方式；研究路径
cards.sentenceEn: A purely technical approach may overlook the social causes of the problem.
cards.sentenceZh: 纯技术性的处理方法可能会忽视该问题的社会成因。
cards.clozeSuffix: may overlook the social causes of the problem.
cards.definitionZh: 方法；处理方式；研究路径
cards.usageNotes: 常见 an approach to + 名词/动名词；注意介词用 to，不用 of。
wordFamily: approach v. 接近；着手处理

extraExamples.en: Researchers adopted a different approach to measuring well-being.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员采用了不同的方法衡量福祉。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The article treats privacy as a political issue rather than a merely technical one.
cards.sentenceZh: 这篇文章把隐私视为一个政治议题，而不只是技术问题。
cards.clozePrefix: The article treats privacy as a political
cards.clozeSuffix: rather than a merely technical one.
cards.usageNotes: issue 常指公共讨论中的议题；problem 更强调需要解决的困难。

relatedExpressions.note: 可指待讨论或待回答的问题

extraExamples.en: Climate change has become a central issue in economic policy.
extraExamples.zh: 气候变化已成为经济政策中的核心议题。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 指责；控告；声称（常接 that 从句）
cards.sentenceEn: Some critics charge that the policy favors large firms over small businesses.
cards.sentenceZh: 一些批评者指责该政策偏袒大企业而非小企业。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the policy favors large firms over small businesses.
cards.definitionZh: 指责；控告；声称（常接 that 从句）
cards.usageNotes: charge that... 在评论文中表示“指责/声称”；另有 charge sb with sth“指控某人某事”。

relatedExpressions.note: 通常接 accuse sb of sth，明确指控某人
泛指批评，不一定包含正式指控

wordFamily: charge n. 费用；指控；负责
charged adj. 充满强烈情绪的

extraExamples.en: The company was charged with misleading consumers.
extraExamples.zh: 该公司被指控误导消费者。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The author does not claim that technology alone can eliminate inequality.
cards.sentenceZh: 作者并未声称仅靠技术就能消除不平等。
cards.clozeSuffix: that technology alone can eliminate inequality.
cards.usageNotes: claim that... 表示提出尚需证据支持的主张；阅读中要区分“作者观点”和“被引述者的声称”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调给出论据进行论证
语气更强，强调明确断言

wordFamily: claim n. 主张；权利要求

extraExamples.en: The evidence is too limited to support such a broad claim.
extraExamples.zh: 这些证据太有限，无法支持如此宽泛的主张。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Policy makers must balance private interest against the public good.
cards.sentenceZh: 政策制定者必须在私人利益与公共利益之间取得平衡。
cards.clozeSuffix: against the public good.
cards.usageNotes: in the interest(s) of 表示“为了……的利益”；vested interests 指既得利益集团。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调与结果有直接利害关系

extraExamples.en: Researchers should disclose any financial interests.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员应披露任何经济利益关系。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Several researchers object to treating test scores as the sole measure of ability.
cards.sentenceZh: 几位研究人员反对把考试分数作为衡量能力的唯一标准。
cards.clozeSuffix: to treating test scores as the sole measure of ability.
cards.usageNotes: 作动词时常用 object to + 名词/动名词；to 是介词，后接 doing。

relatedExpressions.note: 及物动词，可直接接名词或 doing
可指公开抗议，也可指口头反对

extraExamples.en: Residents objected to the proposed expansion of the airport.
extraExamples.zh: 居民反对拟议中的机场扩建。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The same principle does not apply to every cultural context.
cards.sentenceZh: 同一原则并不适用于所有文化背景。
cards.clozeSuffix: to every cultural context.
cards.usageNotes: apply to 表示“适用于”；apply for 表示“申请”；apply A to B 表示“把 A 应用于 B”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调把计划、政策付诸实施

extraExamples.en: These rules apply equally to public and private institutions.
extraExamples.zh: 这些规则同样适用于公立和私立机构。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The course of social change is rarely smooth or predictable.
cards.sentenceZh: 社会变革的进程很少是平稳或可预测的。
cards.clozeSuffix: of social change is rarely smooth or predictable.
cards.usageNotes: in the course of 表示“在……过程中”；course 不只表示“课程”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调一系列步骤或变化

extraExamples.en: The debate changed course after new evidence emerged.
extraExamples.zh: 新证据出现后，讨论改变了方向。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The policy fails to deal with the long-term effects of population ageing.
cards.sentenceZh: 该政策未能处理人口老龄化的长期影响。
cards.clozeSuffix: with the long-term effects of population ageing.
cards.usageNotes: deal with 可表示“处理问题”“与人打交道”或“论述主题”，需结合宾语判断。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调实际操作或控制局面

extraExamples.en: The final section deals with the ethical limits of the experiment.
extraExamples.zh: 最后一节讨论了该实验的伦理边界。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A notable feature of the argument is its emphasis on individual responsibility.
cards.sentenceZh: 这一论点的一个显著特征是强调个人责任。
cards.clozeSuffix: of the argument is its emphasis on individual responsibility.
cards.usageNotes: a feature of 表示“……的特征”；作动词 feature 可表示“以……为特色”或“重点介绍”。

relatedExpressions.note: 可指典型特征，常含辨识作用
常指人的性格或生物特性

wordFamily: featured adj. 被重点介绍的

extraExamples.en: Flexibility is a central feature of the new framework.
extraExamples.zh: 灵活性是新框架的核心特征。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: These figures reflect changes in reporting practices as well as real behavior.
cards.sentenceZh: 这些数字既反映了报告方式的变化，也反映了真实行为的变化。
cards.clozeSuffix: changes in reporting practices as well as real behavior.
cards.usageNotes: reflect 可表示“反映事实”，也可用 reflect on/upon 表示“认真思考”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调像镜子一样呈现相似模式

extraExamples.en: The results may reflect differences in access rather than ability.
extraExamples.zh: 这些结果可能反映的是获取机会的差异，而非能力差异。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The term is often used loosely, which can lead to misunderstanding.
cards.sentenceZh: 这个术语常被宽泛地使用，因而可能导致误解。
cards.clozeSuffix: is often used loosely, which can lead to misunderstanding.
cards.usageNotes: in terms of 表示“就……而言”；terms 复数还可表示条件、关系。

extraExamples.en: The two theories describe the same process in different terms.
extraExamples.zh: 这两种理论用不同术语描述同一过程。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Some economists maintain that higher income does not automatically produce greater happiness.
cards.sentenceZh: 一些经济学家坚持认为，更高收入不会自动带来更多幸福。
cards.clozeSuffix: that higher income does not automatically produce greater happiness.
cards.usageNotes: maintain that... 是考研阅读高频义，表示“坚持某观点”；另常见 maintain stability。

relatedExpressions.note: 声称，不一定强调持续坚持

extraExamples.en: The researchers maintain that the correlation is not evidence of causation.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员坚持认为，相关性并不能证明因果关系。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The model assumes that individuals have access to complete information.
cards.sentenceZh: 该模型假定个人能够获得完整信息。
cards.clozeSuffix: that individuals have access to complete information.
cards.usageNotes: assume that... 表示为推理暂作假设；assume responsibility 表示“承担责任”。

relatedExpressions.note: 根据一定可能性作推定
日常语体中更普通的“假设”

extraExamples.en: We should not assume that silence means agreement.
extraExamples.zh: 我们不应假定沉默就意味着同意。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The available evidence does not establish a causal link between the two trends.
cards.sentenceZh: 现有证据并不能证实这两种趋势之间存在因果联系。
cards.clozeSuffix: a causal link between the two trends.
cards.usageNotes: establish a fact/link 表示“证实”；establish a system/institution 表示“建立”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调以充分证据证明为真

extraExamples.en: The study establishes a clear relationship between sleep and memory.
extraExamples.zh: 该研究确立了睡眠与记忆之间的明确关系。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Small firms constitute the majority of employers in the region.
cards.sentenceZh: 小企业构成该地区雇主的多数。
cards.clozeSuffix: the majority of employers in the region.
cards.usageNotes: A constitutes B 表示“A 构成 B”；正式语体中也可表示“相当于、构成某种行为”。

relatedExpressions.note: 整体由若干部分组成，常用 the whole comprises parts
部分组成整体，常用 parts compose the whole

extraExamples.en: Failure to disclose the data may constitute a breach of trust.
extraExamples.zh: 未披露数据可能构成对信任的破坏。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Much of the institution's authority derives from public trust.
cards.sentenceZh: 该机构的大部分权威源自公众信任。
cards.clozeSuffix: from public trust.
cards.usageNotes: derive from 表示“源自”；derive A from B 表示“从 B 获得/推导 A”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调起源于某处或某时
强调依据逻辑推导结论

extraExamples.en: Researchers derived the estimate from several independent data sets.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员从多个独立数据集中推导出该估计值。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The same evidence can be interpreted in several different ways.
cards.sentenceZh: 同一证据可以有多种不同的解读方式。
cards.clozeSuffix: in several different ways.
cards.usageNotes: interpret A as B 表示“把 A 理解为 B”；注意与 translate“翻译语言”区分。

extraExamples.en: It would be a mistake to interpret correlation as causation.
extraExamples.zh: 把相关性理解为因果关系将是错误的。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The final chapter concerns the ethical responsibilities of researchers.
cards.sentenceZh: 最后一章涉及研究人员的伦理责任。
cards.clozeSuffix: the ethical responsibilities of researchers.
cards.usageNotes: concern 作动词可表示“涉及”；be concerned with 表示“涉及/关注”，be concerned about 表示“担忧”。

extraExamples.en: This debate concerns how limited public resources should be allocated.
extraExamples.zh: 这场讨论涉及有限公共资源应如何分配。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Many readers regard the proposal as unrealistic but intellectually valuable.
cards.sentenceZh: 许多读者认为该提议不切实际，但在思想上有价值。
cards.clozeSuffix: the proposal as unrealistic but intellectually valuable.
cards.usageNotes: regard A as B 是固定结构；with regard to 表示“关于”。

relatedExpressions.note: 可直接接宾语补足语，语体更宽泛

extraExamples.en: The law regards access to basic education as a public right.
extraExamples.zh: 法律把接受基础教育视为一项公共权利。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Economic factors figure prominently in the debate over migration.
cards.sentenceZh: 经济因素在移民问题的讨论中占据重要地位。
cards.clozeSuffix: prominently in the debate over migration.
cards.usageNotes: figure prominently/large in 表示“在……中很重要”；figure out 表示“弄清楚”。
wordFamily: figure n. 数字；人物；图形

extraExamples.en: Questions of fairness figure heavily in the policy discussion.
extraExamples.zh: 公平问题在政策讨论中占有重要分量。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The author observes that efficiency and fairness do not always coincide.
cards.sentenceZh: 作者指出，效率与公平并不总是一致。
cards.clozeSuffix: that efficiency and fairness do not always coincide.
cards.usageNotes: 学术写作中的 observe that 常表示“指出/评论”；另有 observe a rule“遵守规则”。

extraExamples.en: Several scholars have observed a similar pattern in other countries.
extraExamples.zh: 几位学者在其他国家也观察到了类似模式。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Universities should engage students in evaluating competing arguments.
cards.sentenceZh: 大学应让学生参与评估相互竞争的论点。
cards.clozeSuffix: students in evaluating competing arguments.
cards.usageNotes: engage sb in sth 表示“使某人参与”；engage in 表示“从事”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调让某人成为活动的一部分

extraExamples.en: Citizens are more likely to engage in public debate when information is accessible.
extraExamples.zh: 信息易于获取时，公民更可能参与公共讨论。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The team will conduct a follow-up survey to test the initial findings.
cards.sentenceZh: 该团队将开展后续调查，以检验最初的研究结果。
cards.clozeSuffix: a follow-up survey to test the initial findings.
cards.usageNotes: conduct research/survey/experiment 是正式搭配；名词 conduct 表示“行为”。

relatedExpressions.note: 常用于任务、操作或表演

extraExamples.en: Independent researchers conducted the same experiment under stricter conditions.
extraExamples.zh: 独立研究人员在更严格条件下开展了同一实验。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 可获得的；可利用的；有空的
cards.sentenceEn: The conclusion should be based on the best evidence currently available.
cards.sentenceZh: 结论应以目前可获得的最佳证据为基础。
cards.clozePrefix: The conclusion should be based on the best evidence currently
cards.definitionZh: 可获得的；可利用的；有空的
cards.usageNotes: available 常后置修饰名词，如 evidence available；be available to sb 表示“可供某人使用”。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调易于进入、理解或获得

extraExamples.en: Reliable data are not equally available in every region.
extraExamples.zh: 并非每个地区都能同等获得可靠数据。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The journal declined to publish the paper without access to the underlying data.
cards.sentenceZh: 由于无法获得底层数据，该期刊拒绝发表这篇论文。
cards.clozeSuffix: to publish the paper without access to the underlying data.
cards.usageNotes: decline to do 是较正式的“拒绝做”；decline by/to/from 用于数量下降。

extraExamples.en: Participation declined after the financial support was withdrawn.
extraExamples.zh: 资金支持撤回后，参与度下降了。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The author reserves judgment until more reliable evidence becomes available.
cards.sentenceZh: 作者在获得更多可靠证据之前暂不作判断。
cards.clozeSuffix: judgment until more reliable evidence becomes available.
cards.usageNotes: reserve judgment 表示“保留判断”；reserve A for B 表示“为 B 留出 A”。

relatedExpressions.note: 保护某物不受损或改变

wordFamily: reservation n. 保留意见；预订

extraExamples.en: Researchers reserved part of the sample for independent testing.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员保留了部分样本用于独立检验。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The research team failed to secure enough funding for a national survey.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究团队未能获得足够资金开展全国性调查。
cards.clozeSuffix: enough funding for a national survey.
cards.usageNotes: secure funding/support/access 表示“成功获得”；secure sth against 表示“使……免受”。

extraExamples.en: The agreement secured wider access to public data.
extraExamples.zh: 该协议确保了更广泛的公共数据获取权。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Economics emerged as a distinct discipline in the modern university.
cards.sentenceZh: 经济学在现代大学中发展成为一门独立学科。
cards.clozeSuffix: in the modern university.
cards.usageNotes: discipline 在学术语境常指“学科”；academic discipline 是高频搭配。
wordFamily: disciplinary adj. 学科的；纪律的

extraExamples.en: The question requires knowledge from several different disciplines.
extraExamples.zh: 这个问题需要多个不同学科的知识。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: In this respect, the new theory differs sharply from the conventional view.
cards.sentenceZh: 在这一方面，新理论与传统观点有明显差异。
cards.clozeSuffix: , the new theory differs sharply from the conventional view.
cards.usageNotes: in this respect 表示“在这方面”；with respect to 表示“关于”。

relatedExpressions.note: 正式语境中的“关于/尊重”

extraExamples.en: The two methods are similar in some respects but not in others.
extraExamples.zh: 这两种方法在某些方面相似，在另一些方面则不同。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: To appreciate the argument, readers must first understand its historical background.
cards.sentenceZh: 要充分理解这一论点，读者必须先了解其历史背景。
cards.clozeSuffix: the argument, readers must first understand its historical background.
cards.usageNotes: appreciate 可表示“充分理解某事的重要性”，不仅是“感激”。

extraExamples.en: It is difficult to appreciate the scale of the change from a single statistic.
extraExamples.zh: 仅凭一个统计数字很难理解变化的规模。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The framework must be flexible enough to accommodate regional differences.
cards.sentenceZh: 该框架必须足够灵活，以顾及地区差异。
cards.clozePrefix: The framework must be flexible enough to
cards.clozeSuffix: regional differences.
cards.usageNotes: accommodate differences/needs 表示“容纳、顾及”；accommodate oneself to 表示“使自己适应”。

extraExamples.en: The timetable was revised to accommodate students with part-time jobs.
extraExamples.zh: 时间表经过调整，以照顾兼职学生的需要。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The report advocates greater public investment in preventive health care.
cards.sentenceZh: 该报告主张增加对预防性医疗的公共投入。
cards.clozeSuffix: greater public investment in preventive health care.
cards.usageNotes: advocate 后直接接名词或 doing，不接 advocate to do；作名词表示“倡导者”。

relatedExpressions.note: 提出建议，语气通常较弱

extraExamples.en: Many scholars advocate treating access to information as a basic right.
extraExamples.zh: 许多学者主张把信息获取视为一项基本权利。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 替代方案；可供选择的事物
cards.sentenceEn: The proposal offers no realistic alternative to the existing system.
cards.sentenceZh: 该提议没有为现行制度提供现实可行的替代方案。
cards.clozeSuffix: to the existing system.
cards.definitionZh: 替代方案；可供选择的事物
cards.usageNotes: an alternative to 是固定搭配；alternative choice 常显得重复。

relatedExpressions.note: 可替代原事物的人或物

wordFamily: alternatively adv. 作为另一选择

extraExamples.en: Public transport provides an alternative to private car use.
extraExamples.zh: 公共交通为使用私家车提供了替代选择。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 任意的；武断的；缺乏合理依据的
cards.sentenceEn: The boundary between the two categories is largely arbitrary.
cards.sentenceZh: 这两个类别之间的界线在很大程度上是人为任意划定的。
cards.clozePrefix: The boundary between the two categories is largely
cards.definitionZh: 任意的；武断的；缺乏合理依据的
cards.usageNotes: arbitrary 强调决定没有一致原则或充分理由，并非只是“随机”。

extraExamples.en: An arbitrary deadline may encourage speed at the expense of quality.
extraExamples.zh: 一个武断设定的期限可能会以牺牲质量为代价鼓励速度。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The apparent contradiction disappears once the terms are defined more carefully.
cards.sentenceZh: 一旦更仔细地界定术语，表面上的矛盾就会消失。
cards.clozeSuffix: contradiction disappears once the terms are defined more carefully.
cards.usageNotes: apparent 可表示“显而易见的”，也可表示“表面如此但未必真实”，需结合语境。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调看似如此但可能不真实

extraExamples.en: The benefits are less apparent when long-term costs are included.
extraExamples.zh: 把长期成本考虑在内后，这些好处就不那么明显了。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A single national standard may not be appropriate for every local community.
cards.sentenceZh: 单一的全国标准未必适合每个地方社区。
cards.clozePrefix: A single national standard may not be
cards.clozeSuffix: for every local community.
cards.usageNotes: be appropriate for/to；注意 appropriate 作动词时还可表示“拨款、挪用”。

relatedExpressions.note: 符合规范、礼仪或正确做法

extraExamples.en: Researchers must choose methods appropriate to the question being asked.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员必须选择适合所提问题的方法。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The study assesses whether the program produces lasting changes in behavior.
cards.sentenceZh: 该研究评估该项目是否会带来持久的行为变化。
cards.clozeSuffix: whether the program produces lasting changes in behavior.
cards.usageNotes: assess risk/impact/effectiveness；通常强调依据证据作系统判断。

relatedExpressions.note: 按标准评价价值或效果
对数量或程度作近似估计

extraExamples.en: It is too early to assess the long-term consequences of the policy.
extraExamples.zh: 现在评估该政策的长期后果还为时过早。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: It is misleading to attribute the entire decline to a single policy change.
cards.sentenceZh: 把全部下降归因于一项政策变化是误导性的。
cards.clozeSuffix: the entire decline to a single policy change.
cards.usageNotes: attribute A to B 表示“把 A 归因于 B”；名词 attribute 表示“属性”。

relatedExpressions.note: 正式语体，表示归因或归属于
常表示把功劳归于某人

extraExamples.en: The improvement was partly attributed to better teacher training.
extraExamples.zh: 这一改善部分归因于更好的教师培训。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Institutions differ greatly in their capacity to respond to rapid change.
cards.sentenceZh: 各机构应对快速变化的能力差异很大。
cards.clozeSuffix: to respond to rapid change.
cards.usageNotes: capacity to do 强调潜在或制度性能力；in one's capacity as 表示“以……身份”。

relatedExpressions.note: 个人做某事的一般能力
具备完成特定任务的能力

extraExamples.en: The reform increased the local government's capacity to deliver services.
extraExamples.zh: 改革提升了地方政府提供服务的能力。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The findings challenge the assumption that economic growth benefits everyone equally.
cards.sentenceZh: 这些研究结果质疑了“经济增长会让所有人同等受益”这一假设。
cards.clozeSuffix: the assumption that economic growth benefits everyone equally.
cards.usageNotes: challenge an assumption/view 表示“质疑”；不只是“面临困难”。

relatedExpressions.note: 明确否认某主张的真实性或合法性

extraExamples.en: New evidence has challenged the conventional account of the event.
extraExamples.zh: 新证据对这一事件的传统解释提出了质疑。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 复杂的；由多部分组成的
cards.sentenceEn: Human motivation is too complex to be explained by a single factor.
cards.sentenceZh: 人的动机过于复杂，无法由单一因素解释。
cards.clozeSuffix: to be explained by a single factor.
cards.definitionZh: 复杂的；由多部分组成的
cards.usageNotes: complex 强调组成部分相互关联；complicated 更强调难以理解或操作。

extraExamples.en: The relationship between income and health is complex and indirect.
extraExamples.zh: 收入与健康之间的关系复杂且并非直接。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A comprehensive explanation must consider economic, cultural, and psychological factors.
cards.sentenceZh: 全面的解释必须考虑经济、文化和心理因素。
cards.clozeSuffix: explanation must consider economic, cultural, and psychological factors.
cards.usageNotes: comprehensive 强调覆盖范围广且较完整；常修饰 review、survey、policy。

extraExamples.en: The report provides a comprehensive overview of recent research.
extraExamples.zh: 该报告对近期研究作了全面综述。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: It is difficult to conceive of progress without some willingness to accept risk.
cards.sentenceZh: 很难设想在完全不愿承担风险的情况下还能取得进步。
cards.clozeSuffix: of progress without some willingness to accept risk.
cards.usageNotes: conceive of A as B / conceive of doing；正式语体中表示“设想、理解”。

relatedExpressions.note: 把想法明确形成方案或表述

extraExamples.en: Justice is often conceived as equal treatment under common rules.
extraExamples.zh: 正义常被理解为在共同规则下受到平等对待。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The researchers conclude that the evidence is suggestive but not decisive.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员得出结论：这些证据具有提示性，但并非决定性的。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the evidence is suggestive but not decisive.
cards.usageNotes: conclude that 表示得出结论；conclude from 表示从……推断；不要与 include 混淆。

relatedExpressions.note: 依据线索推断未明说的信息

extraExamples.en: We cannot conclude from correlation alone that one factor causes the other.
extraExamples.zh: 我们不能仅凭相关性就断定一个因素导致另一个因素。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 一致的；符合的；始终如一的
cards.sentenceEn: The observed pattern is consistent with the theory, but it does not prove the theory.
cards.sentenceZh: 观察到的模式与该理论一致，但并不能证明该理论。
cards.clozeSuffix: with the theory, but it does not prove the theory.
cards.definitionZh: 一致的；符合的；始终如一的
cards.usageNotes: be consistent with 表示“与……一致/相符”；consistent in 表示在行为上始终一致。

relatedExpressions.note: 在各处保持相同形式或水平

extraExamples.en: The results are broadly consistent across age groups.
extraExamples.zh: 不同年龄组的结果大体一致。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Limited funding can constrain the range of questions a study is able to examine.
cards.sentenceZh: 有限资金会限制一项研究能够考察的问题范围。
cards.clozeSuffix: the range of questions a study is able to examine.
cards.usageNotes: constrain choice/growth/action；常用于说明资源、制度或条件造成的限制。

extraExamples.en: Researchers were constrained by the lack of reliable historical data.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员受到可靠历史数据不足的限制。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A statement that seems extreme in isolation may appear reasonable in context.
cards.sentenceZh: 一句孤立看来极端的话，放在语境中可能显得合理。
cards.clozePrefix: A statement that seems extreme in isolation may appear reasonable in
cards.usageNotes: in context / in the context of；考研阅读中词义和观点都需结合上下文判断。

relatedExpressions.note: 提供理解所需的背景信息

wordFamily: contextualize v. 置于背景中理解

extraExamples.en: The policy can only be understood within its historical context.
extraExamples.zh: 只有放在历史背景中才能理解这项政策。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 传统的；常规的；约定俗成的
cards.sentenceEn: The new findings call the conventional explanation into question.
cards.sentenceZh: 新发现使传统解释受到质疑。
cards.clozeSuffix: explanation into question.
cards.definitionZh: 传统的；常规的；约定俗成的
cards.usageNotes: conventional wisdom 表示“传统看法/普遍观念”，常在转折中被质疑。

relatedExpressions.note: 被某一群体认可的正统观点

extraExamples.en: The study uses a method that differs from conventional practice.
extraExamples.zh: 该研究采用了不同于常规做法的方法。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 关键的；批判性的；危急的
cards.sentenceEn: Access to reliable data is critical to evaluating the success of the reform.
cards.sentenceZh: 获得可靠数据对于评估改革成效至关重要。
cards.clozeSuffix: to evaluating the success of the reform.
cards.definitionZh: 关键的；批判性的；危急的
cards.usageNotes: be critical to 表示“对……至关重要”；critical of 表示“批评……”。

relatedExpressions.note: 持怀疑态度，不等于批判分析

extraExamples.en: Critical reading requires attention to both evidence and assumptions.
extraExamples.zh: 批判性阅读要求同时关注证据和假设。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The experiment demonstrates that small changes in wording can influence judgment.
cards.sentenceZh: 该实验证明，措辞的细微变化会影响判断。
cards.clozeSuffix: that small changes in wording can influence judgment.
cards.usageNotes: demonstrate that 常用于证据“证明/表明”；show 语体更普通。

relatedExpressions.note: 要求更充分、决定性的证据

extraExamples.en: The data demonstrate a steady decline in public trust.
extraExamples.zh: 数据显示公众信任持续下降。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Good analysis must distinguish correlation from causation.
cards.sentenceZh: 好的分析必须区分相关性与因果关系。
cards.clozeSuffix: correlation from causation.
cards.usageNotes: distinguish A from B / distinguish between A and B 是高频结构。

extraExamples.en: The author distinguishes short-term effects from long-term consequences.
extraExamples.zh: 作者区分了短期影响与长期后果。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A small number of large firms dominate the digital advertising market.
cards.sentenceZh: 少数大型公司支配着数字广告市场。
cards.clozePrefix: A small number of large firms
cards.clozeSuffix: the digital advertising market.
cards.usageNotes: dominate a market/debate；也可用 be dominated by 表示“由……占主导”。

relatedExpressions.note: 某观点或状况最终占优势

extraExamples.en: Economic concerns dominated the discussion.
extraExamples.zh: 经济问题在讨论中占据主导地位。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The theory achieves economy by explaining several patterns with one principle.
cards.sentenceZh: 该理论用一个原理解释多种模式，因而具有简洁性。
cards.clozeSuffix: by explaining several patterns with one principle.
cards.usageNotes: economy 在正式语境可表示“节约、简洁”；economy of expression 指表达简练。

relatedExpressions.note: 以较少资源取得较好结果

extraExamples.en: The essay is admired for the economy and precision of its language.
extraExamples.zh: 这篇文章因语言简练而精确受到赞赏。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A more complicated picture emerges when regional differences are considered.
cards.sentenceZh: 把地区差异考虑在内后，会呈现出一幅更复杂的图景。
cards.clozeSuffix: when regional differences are considered.
cards.usageNotes: emerge from 表示“从……中出现”；常与 pattern、evidence、picture 搭配。

relatedExpressions.note: 问题或情况产生，常无被动语态

extraExamples.en: Several common themes emerged from the interviews.
extraExamples.zh: 访谈中呈现出几个共同主题。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Digital archives enable researchers to compare sources from different periods.
cards.sentenceZh: 数字档案使研究人员能够比较不同时期的资料。
cards.clozeSuffix: researchers to compare sources from different periods.
cards.usageNotes: enable sb to do 是固定结构；主语常为技术、制度或条件。

extraExamples.en: The new method enables more precise measurement of small changes.
extraExamples.zh: 新方法使更精确地测量微小变化成为可能。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Researchers often encounter difficulties when comparing data collected under different standards.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员在比较按不同标准收集的数据时常会遇到困难。
cards.clozeSuffix: difficulties when comparing data collected under different standards.
cards.usageNotes: encounter a problem/resistance；语体比 meet with 更正式。

extraExamples.en: The proposal encountered strong opposition from local residents.
extraExamples.zh: 该提议遭到当地居民的强烈反对。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Equal treatment is not always equivalent to fair treatment.
cards.sentenceZh: 同等对待并不总是等同于公平对待。
cards.clozeSuffix: to fair treatment.
cards.usageNotes: be equivalent to 是固定搭配；不说 equivalent with。

relatedExpressions.note: 足以进行比较，但不一定相等

extraExamples.en: One year of experience was treated as equivalent to formal training.
extraExamples.zh: 一年工作经验被视为等同于正式培训。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The review evaluates the evidence for and against the proposed explanation.
cards.sentenceZh: 这篇综述评估了支持和反对所提解释的证据。
cards.clozeSuffix: the evidence for and against the proposed explanation.
cards.usageNotes: evaluate effectiveness/evidence；比 assess 更突出按标准判断价值或效果。

relatedExpressions.note: 系统估量状态、风险或影响

extraExamples.en: The program should be evaluated against clearly stated objectives.
extraExamples.zh: 应根据明确陈述的目标评价该项目。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: There is little evidence that the policy has improved long-term employment.
cards.sentenceZh: 几乎没有证据表明该政策改善了长期就业。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the policy has improved long-term employment.
cards.usageNotes: evidence 通常不可数；说 a piece/body of evidence，不说 an evidence。

relatedExpressions.note: 足以证明结论为真的证据
提示某事可能为真的迹象

extraExamples.en: The claim is not supported by sufficient empirical evidence.
extraExamples.zh: 这一主张没有得到充分实证证据的支持。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The analysis excludes cases for which essential information is missing.
cards.sentenceZh: 该分析排除了缺少关键信息的案例。
cards.clozeSuffix: cases for which essential information is missing.
cards.usageNotes: exclude A from B；rule out 常用于排除可能性。
wordFamily: exclusive adj. 排他的；独有的

extraExamples.en: The data do not exclude the possibility of an alternative explanation.
extraExamples.zh: 这些数据并未排除另一种解释的可能性。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 明确的；清楚陈述的；直白的
cards.sentenceEn: The author makes no explicit distinction between temporary and permanent change.
cards.sentenceZh: 作者没有明确区分暂时变化与永久变化。
cards.clozeSuffix: distinction between temporary and permanent change.
cards.definitionZh: 明确的；清楚陈述的；直白的
cards.usageNotes: explicit 强调直接说出，不需推断；与 implicit“隐含的”相对。

extraExamples.en: The assumptions should be made explicit before the model is tested.
extraExamples.zh: 在检验模型前，应明确说明其假设。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Shared standards facilitate comparison across different studies.
cards.sentenceZh: 共同标准有助于比较不同研究。
cards.clozeSuffix: comparison across different studies.
cards.usageNotes: facilitate 后直接接名词/doing，正式语体常表示“使过程更顺利”。

extraExamples.en: Clear definitions facilitate more productive debate.
extraExamples.zh: 清晰定义有助于开展更有成效的讨论。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 根本的；基础的；极重要的
cards.sentenceEn: The debate raises a fundamental question about the purpose of education.
cards.sentenceZh: 这场讨论提出了一个关于教育目的的根本问题。
cards.clozeSuffix: question about the purpose of education.
cards.definitionZh: 根本的；基础的；极重要的
cards.usageNotes: fundamental 强调构成基础、不能轻易忽略；常修饰 principle、change、difference。

extraExamples.en: The two approaches rest on fundamentally different assumptions.
extraExamples.zh: 这两种方法建立在根本不同的假设上。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The new policy may generate unintended costs for small businesses.
cards.sentenceZh: 新政策可能给小企业带来意料之外的成本。
cards.clozeSuffix: unintended costs for small businesses.
cards.usageNotes: generate income/data/interest；正式语体中常替代 produce。

relatedExpressions.note: 强调创造原先不存在的事物

extraExamples.en: The survey generated a large amount of useful data.
extraExamples.zh: 这项调查产生了大量有用数据。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Even critics grant that the reform has improved access to basic services.
cards.sentenceZh: 即使批评者也承认，这项改革改善了基础服务的可及性。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the reform has improved access to basic services.
cards.usageNotes: grant that 在让步论证中表示“承认”；grant sb sth 表示“授予”。

relatedExpressions.note: 在争论中承认对方某一点

extraExamples.en: Granted, the sample is small, but the pattern is still worth examining.
extraExamples.zh: 诚然，样本很小，但这一模式仍值得研究。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The study identifies three factors that influence public trust.
cards.sentenceZh: 该研究确定了影响公众信任的三个因素。
cards.clozeSuffix: three factors that influence public trust.
cards.usageNotes: identify A as B 表示“认定 A 为 B”；identify with 表示“认同”。

relatedExpressions.note: 识别已知事物或承认事实
发现不易察觉的信号或问题

extraExamples.en: Researchers identified education as the strongest predictor of participation.
extraExamples.zh: 研究人员认定教育是参与度最强的预测因素。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A rise in productivity does not necessarily imply an improvement in well-being.
cards.sentenceZh: 生产率提高并不一定意味着福祉改善。
cards.clozePrefix: A rise in productivity does not necessarily
cards.clozeSuffix: an improvement in well-being.
cards.usageNotes: imply 是说话者/事实“暗示”；infer 是读者“推断”，两者方向相反。

extraExamples.en: The wording implies that responsibility lies with individuals rather than institutions.
extraExamples.zh: 措辞暗示责任在个人而非机构。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Uniform rules may impose heavy costs on communities with limited resources.
cards.sentenceZh: 统一规则可能给资源有限的社区带来沉重成本。
cards.clozeSuffix: heavy costs on communities with limited resources.
cards.usageNotes: impose A on B；常搭配 tax、burden、restriction、standard。

relatedExpressions.note: 执行已经存在的法律或规则

extraExamples.en: The law imposes strict limits on the use of personal data.
extraExamples.zh: 法律对个人数据的使用施加严格限制。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The results indicate that the effect is smaller than previously assumed.
cards.sentenceZh: 结果表明，该影响比先前假定的更小。
cards.clozeSuffix: that the effect is smaller than previously assumed.
cards.usageNotes: indicate that 常用于谨慎陈述证据；语气通常弱于 prove。

extraExamples.en: Several indicators suggest that public confidence is recovering.
extraExamples.zh: 多项指标表明公众信心正在恢复。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 不可避免的；必然发生的
cards.sentenceEn: Technological change is not inevitable; it is shaped by social choices.
cards.sentenceZh: 技术变革并非不可避免，而是受到社会选择的塑造。
cards.clozeSuffix: ; it is shaped by social choices.
cards.definitionZh: 不可避免的；必然发生的
cards.usageNotes: inevitable 常在作者反驳“必然论”时出现；be inevitable that/inevitable consequence。

relatedExpressions.note: 因现实条件而无法避免
确定会发生，但不强调无法阻止

extraExamples.en: Conflict is not an inevitable result of cultural difference.
extraExamples.zh: 冲突并非文化差异的必然结果。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: We cannot infer individual attitudes from national averages alone.
cards.sentenceZh: 我们不能仅凭全国平均值推断个人态度。
cards.clozeSuffix: individual attitudes from national averages alone.
cards.usageNotes: infer A from B；注意不要与 imply 混淆：证据 implies，读者 infers。

relatedExpressions.note: 依据规则或逻辑必然推导

extraExamples.en: From the absence of complaints, one should not infer complete satisfaction.
extraExamples.zh: 不应从没有投诉推断出所有人都完全满意。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Fear of failure can inhibit creative thinking and open discussion.
cards.sentenceZh: 对失败的恐惧会抑制创造性思维和开放讨论。
cards.clozeSuffix: creative thinking and open discussion.
cards.usageNotes: inhibit growth/innovation/expression；比 prevent 更强调削弱或限制过程。

extraExamples.en: Excessive regulation may inhibit the development of small firms.
extraExamples.zh: 过度监管可能抑制小企业发展。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The initial results were encouraging, but later studies were less conclusive.
cards.sentenceZh: 最初结果令人鼓舞，但后续研究的结论没有那么确定。
cards.clozeSuffix: results were encouraging, but later studies were less conclusive.
cards.usageNotes: initial 表示时间或顺序上的第一阶段；常与 preliminary“初步的”近义。

relatedExpressions.note: 为正式工作做准备的初步阶段

extraExamples.en: The initial hypothesis was revised after new data became available.
extraExamples.zh: 新数据出现后，最初假设被修订。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Governments may institute temporary controls during a public emergency.
cards.sentenceZh: 政府可能在公共紧急状态期间实行临时管制。
cards.clozeSuffix: temporary controls during a public emergency.
cards.usageNotes: institute a policy/inquiry/reform 是正式搭配；作名词表示学院或研究机构。

relatedExpressions.note: 执行已制定的计划或政策

extraExamples.en: The university instituted a review of its admissions procedures.
extraExamples.zh: 该大学启动了对招生程序的审查。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The model integrates economic data with evidence from social psychology.
cards.sentenceZh: 该模型把经济数据与社会心理学证据整合起来。
cards.clozeSuffix: economic data with evidence from social psychology.
cards.usageNotes: integrate A with/into B；强调形成协调的整体。

relatedExpressions.note: 把某一部分纳入更大的整体

extraExamples.en: Schools need to integrate digital tools into ordinary classroom practice.
extraExamples.zh: 学校需要把数字工具融入日常课堂实践。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The potential benefits do not justify ignoring the risks to privacy.
cards.sentenceZh: 潜在收益并不能证明忽视隐私风险是合理的。
cards.clozeSuffix: ignoring the risks to privacy.
cards.usageNotes: justify doing / justify a decision；be justified in doing 表示“有正当理由做”。

relatedExpressions.note: 说明原因，但不一定证明合理

extraExamples.en: The authors must justify their choice of sample and method.
extraExamples.zh: 作者必须说明其样本与方法选择的合理性。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The study proposes a mechanism through which inequality affects health.
cards.sentenceZh: 该研究提出了一种不平等影响健康的机制。
cards.clozeSuffix: through which inequality affects health.
cards.usageNotes: mechanism through/by which 是解释因果过程的高频结构；不只是“机械装置”。

relatedExpressions.note: 由相互关联部分组成的整体

extraExamples.en: The precise mechanism linking stress to disease remains uncertain.
extraExamples.zh: 压力与疾病之间的确切作用机制仍不确定。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 客观的；不受个人偏见影响的
cards.sentenceEn: An objective assessment requires transparent criteria and independent evidence.
cards.sentenceZh: 客观评估需要透明标准和独立证据。
cards.clozeSuffix: assessment requires transparent criteria and independent evidence.
cards.definitionZh: 客观的；不受个人偏见影响的
cards.usageNotes: objective 作形容词与 subjective 相对；作名词表示目标。

extraExamples.en: No measurement is entirely objective if the categories are poorly defined.
extraExamples.zh: 如果类别界定不清，任何测量都不可能完全客观。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: People may perceive the same risk differently depending on their experience.
cards.sentenceZh: 人们可能因经历不同而对同一风险有不同看法。
cards.clozeSuffix: the same risk differently depending on their experience.
cards.usageNotes: perceive A as B 表示“把 A 看作 B”；也可表示通过感官察觉。

extraExamples.en: The policy was widely perceived as unfair.
extraExamples.zh: 这项政策被普遍认为不公平。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 视角；观点；观察问题的方法
cards.sentenceEn: From a historical perspective, the change was gradual rather than sudden.
cards.sentenceZh: 从历史视角看，这一变化是渐进的而非突然的。
cards.clozeSuffix: , the change was gradual rather than sudden.
cards.definitionZh: 视角；观点；观察问题的方法
cards.usageNotes: from the perspective of / put sth in perspective 是高频搭配。

relatedExpressions.note: 个人或群体的具体观点

extraExamples.en: Comparative research helps place national experience in a broader perspective.
extraExamples.zh: 比较研究有助于从更广阔视角看待一国经验。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The policy is attractive in principle but difficult to implement in practice.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项政策原则上很有吸引力，但在实践中难以实施。
cards.clozeSuffix: but difficult to implement in practice.
cards.usageNotes: in principle 表示“原则上”；on principle 表示“基于原则”。

relatedExpressions.note: 认为重要的信念或标准

extraExamples.en: The principle of equal opportunity does not guarantee equal outcomes.
extraExamples.zh: 机会均等原则并不保证结果相同。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The analysis cannot proceed without a clear definition of the key terms.
cards.sentenceZh: 没有对关键术语的清晰定义，分析就无法继续。
cards.clozeSuffix: without a clear definition of the key terms.
cards.usageNotes: proceed with sth / proceed to do；正式语体常表示下一步行动。
wordFamily: proceedings n. 会议记录；诉讼

extraExamples.en: After reviewing the evidence, the committee proceeded to a vote.
extraExamples.zh: 审查证据后，委员会进入投票阶段。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A growing proportion of research is now published through open-access platforms.
cards.sentenceZh: 越来越高比例的研究如今通过开放获取平台发表。
cards.clozeSuffix: of research is now published through open-access platforms.
cards.usageNotes: a large proportion of + 复数名词，谓语常根据 of 后名词决定。

extraExamples.en: The proportion of older workers has increased steadily.
extraExamples.zh: 年长劳动者的比例持续上升。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Researchers should pursue explanations that can be tested against evidence.
cards.sentenceZh: 研究人员应探索能够用证据检验的解释。
cards.clozeSuffix: explanations that can be tested against evidence.
cards.usageNotes: pursue a goal/career/policy/line of inquiry；语体较正式。

relatedExpressions.note: 沿着既定道路或观点继续

extraExamples.en: The team decided to pursue a different line of investigation.
extraExamples.zh: 团队决定沿着另一条研究思路继续探索。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The survey covers a wide range of social and economic backgrounds.
cards.sentenceZh: 这项调查涵盖广泛的社会和经济背景。
cards.clozeSuffix: of social and economic backgrounds.
cards.usageNotes: a range of 后接复数名词；range from A to B 表示范围从 A 到 B。

relatedExpressions.note: 研究或活动所涵盖的界限

extraExamples.en: Responses ranged from cautious support to strong opposition.
extraExamples.zh: 回应从谨慎支持到强烈反对不等。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Only evidence relevant to the research question should influence the conclusion.
cards.sentenceZh: 只有与研究问题相关的证据才应影响结论。
cards.clozeSuffix: to the research question should influence the conclusion.
cards.usageNotes: be relevant to 是固定搭配；relevant information 指与当前目的直接相关的信息。

relatedExpressions.note: 存在某种联系，不一定切题
正式，强调与当前问题直接相关

extraExamples.en: Historical examples remain relevant to current policy debates.
extraExamples.zh: 历史案例对当前政策讨论仍有参考意义。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The revised model retains the central insight of the earlier theory.
cards.sentenceZh: 修订后的模型保留了早期理论的核心见解。
cards.clozeSuffix: the central insight of the earlier theory.
cards.usageNotes: retain information/control/ownership；比 keep 更正式。

relatedExpressions.note: 保护某物不被破坏或改变

extraExamples.en: The policy retains several features of the previous system.
extraExamples.zh: 该政策保留了原制度的若干特征。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The interviews reveal a gap between official policy and everyday practice.
cards.sentenceZh: 访谈揭示了官方政策与日常实践之间的差距。
cards.clozeSuffix: a gap between official policy and everyday practice.
cards.usageNotes: reveal a pattern/difference；强调把原本隐藏或未知的事物显现出来。

relatedExpressions.note: 正式披露信息，常涉及保密

extraExamples.en: The data reveal that the benefits were unevenly distributed.
extraExamples.zh: 数据显示，这些收益分配并不均衡。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 重要的；显著的；有统计意义的
cards.sentenceEn: The reform produced a significant improvement in access, but not in quality.
cards.sentenceZh: 改革显著改善了可及性，但没有改善质量。
cards.clozeSuffix: improvement in access, but not in quality.
cards.definitionZh: 重要的；显著的；有统计意义的
cards.usageNotes: significant 可表示“重要的”或“统计上显著的”；不能自动等同于“影响很大”。

extraExamples.en: A statistically significant result may still have little practical significance.
extraExamples.zh: 统计上显著的结果在实践中仍可能意义不大。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Short-term enthusiasm is not enough to sustain long-term institutional change.
cards.sentenceZh: 短期热情不足以维持长期制度变革。
cards.clozePrefix: Short-term enthusiasm is not enough to
cards.clozeSuffix: long-term institutional change.
cards.usageNotes: sustain growth/attention/argument；也可表示“遭受损失、受伤”。

relatedExpressions.note: 提供物质、逻辑或情感支撑

extraExamples.en: The evidence is insufficient to sustain such a strong conclusion.
extraExamples.zh: 这些证据不足以支撑如此强的结论。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: There is a tendency to treat measurable outcomes as the only outcomes that matter.
cards.sentenceZh: 人们往往把可测量的结果当作唯一重要的结果。
cards.clozeSuffix: to treat measurable outcomes as the only outcomes that matter.
cards.usageNotes: a tendency to do 是高频结构；可描述行为倾向或长期趋势。

relatedExpressions.note: 可观察到的总体变化方向

extraExamples.en: The media have a tendency to simplify complex scientific debates.
extraExamples.zh: 媒体往往会简化复杂的科学争论。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A useful theory should explain known facts and generate testable predictions.
cards.sentenceZh: 有用的理论既应解释已知事实，也应产生可检验的预测。
cards.clozeSuffix: should explain known facts and generate testable predictions.
cards.usageNotes: in theory 表示“理论上”；theory 不等于毫无根据的猜测。

relatedExpressions.note: 对现实过程的简化表示

extraExamples.en: The theory is elegant, but the supporting evidence remains limited.
extraExamples.zh: 这一理论很精巧，但支持它的证据仍然有限。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: Digital communication has transformed how scientific knowledge is shared.
cards.sentenceZh: 数字通信彻底改变了科学知识的共享方式。
cards.clozeSuffix: how scientific knowledge is shared.
cards.usageNotes: transform A into B 强调性质或形式发生显著变化。

relatedExpressions.note: 从一种形式或用途转换为另一种

extraExamples.en: The discovery transformed a local debate into an international one.
extraExamples.zh: 这一发现把地方性讨论转变为国际性讨论。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.meaningZh: 有效的；有根据的；合理的
cards.sentenceEn: The criticism is valid, although it does not undermine the entire study.
cards.sentenceZh: 这一批评是有根据的，但并不会削弱整项研究。
cards.clozeSuffix: , although it does not undermine the entire study.
cards.definitionZh: 有效的；有根据的；合理的
cards.usageNotes: valid argument/reason/measure；在研究中可指测量是否真正测到目标概念。

relatedExpressions.note: 合法或正当，也可指合理关切

extraExamples.en: The conclusion is valid only under the stated assumptions.
extraExamples.zh: 该结论只在所述假设下有效。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The main virtue of the method is its simplicity rather than its precision.
cards.sentenceZh: 这种方法的主要优点是简单，而不是精确。
cards.clozeSuffix: of the method is its simplicity rather than its precision.
cards.usageNotes: by virtue of 表示“凭借、由于”；virtue 在评价方法时常指“优点”。

relatedExpressions.note: 相对于其他选择的优势
值得肯定的价值或优点

extraExamples.en: The proposal has the virtue of being easy to implement.
extraExamples.zh: 该提议的优点是容易实施。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The first model emphasizes individual choice, whereas the second stresses social structure.
cards.sentenceZh: 第一个模型强调个人选择，而第二个模型强调社会结构。
cards.clozePrefix: The first model emphasizes individual choice,
cards.clozeSuffix: the second stresses social structure.
cards.usageNotes: whereas 连接对比鲜明的两个分句；正式法律文本中也可表示“鉴于”。

relatedExpressions.note: 也可表示对比，但还可表示时间
句间副词短语，需配合标点

extraExamples.en: Some regions experienced growth, whereas others continued to decline.
extraExamples.zh: 一些地区实现增长，而另一些地区继续衰退。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: A larger sample may yield more reliable estimates of the effect.
cards.sentenceZh: 更大的样本可能产生更可靠的效果估计。
cards.clozeSuffix: more reliable estimates of the effect.
cards.usageNotes: yield results/benefits；yield to 表示“向……让步”；名词 yield 表示产量或收益。

relatedExpressions.note: 常指产生数据、收入或反应

extraExamples.en: The analysis yielded no clear evidence of a causal relationship.
extraExamples.zh: 分析没有得出因果关系的明确证据。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容

cards.sentenceEn: The proposed reform would involve major changes to teacher training.
cards.sentenceZh: 拟议改革将涉及教师培训的重大变化。
cards.clozeSuffix: major changes to teacher training.
cards.usageNotes: involve doing 表示“涉及做某事”；involve sb in 表示“使某人参与”。

relatedExpressions.note: 必然带来某种结果或要求

wordFamily: involved adj. 参与的；复杂的

extraExamples.en: Effective evaluation involves comparing outcomes with clearly defined goals.
extraExamples.zh: 有效评估涉及把结果与明确界定的目标进行比较。

cards.source: ECDICT 基础字段 + WordLoop 原创考研学习内容
